architecture_fit.note: Minimal 2-head attention-only transformer (base_model.py minus MLP), the textbook prev-token + induction motif; ~1.0 accuracy solving the goal exactly.

baseline_comparison.note: Prev-token-head ablation collapses accuracy from ~1.0 to the uniform 1/128 baseline, both shown side by side as strawmen.

faithfulness.note: Logits genuinely flow through attention+unembedding (no side gather); zeroing Wo0 breaks induction causally, a real built-in ablation check.

operating_range.note: Distance sweep P∈{16,32,48,64} holds at robustness 1.0, but range is bounded by seq_len=192 — no probe beyond the canonical ~4x span.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Every weight hand-set as CUDA tensors with no training; the circuit is fully written out by hand.

visual_judgement.note: Grouped bar chart (full vs ablated vs uniform line) across distances carries the whole claim at a glance; run dropdown present.

visualisation_rationale.note: README justifies axes (accuracy vs distance), the ablation comparison, and the dashed uniform reference, tying directly to the goal's sweep.

notes: An exemplary hand-built induction circuit: a minimal 2-head attention-only transformer where next-token logits genuinely flow through attention and unembedding, achieving ~1.0 accuracy with a built-in causal ablation that collapses behaviour to the uniform baseline. The visualisation cleanly carries the full-vs-ablated-vs-baseline story across the distance sweep. Only minor knock is operating range, which is bounded by the fixed canonical sweep rather than spanning two orders of magnitude.
